description_long: This refrigerator features a classic two-door design with a freezer compartment on top and a larger refrigerator section below. The exterior is finished in a smooth, metallic silver or white color with a subtle gradient, giving it a modern and clean appearance. Both doors are equipped with vertical, protruding handles on the left side, which are accented with a blue strip for visual contrast. The sides and back of the refrigerator are plain, with no visible vents, grilles, or branding. The overall shape is rectangular with slightly rounded front edges, and the surface appears hard and glossy. The refrigerator is likely constructed from metal and plastic, with an insulated interior and air-filled compartments.
description: A modern, two-door refrigerator with a smooth metallic finish and vertical blue-accented handles. The design is clean and minimalistic, with no visible branding or external controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with vertical blue-accented handles on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth surface with subtle shading and no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel with a uniform finish.
description_view_3: Right side view revealing the profile of the doors and handles, with no additional features.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, protruding handles on the left side of each door with blue accent strips.
